tasks.gen: deno run --frozen --allow-env --allow-read --allow-sys=cpus --allow-write npm:@tanstack/router-cli@1.167.19 generate && deno run --frozen --allow-read --allow-write scripts/strict-route-tree.ts
tasks.web:build: deno task gen && deno run --frozen --allow-env --allow-ffi --allow-net=localhost --allow-read --allow-sys=cpus,homedir,uid --allow-write npm:vite@8.1.4 build
tasks.package: deno task web:build && deno desktop --unstable-no-legacy-abort --allow-env --allow-net --allow-read --allow-run --allow-write --include ../../portal -o PortalShellDesktop.app .
tasks.check: deno task gen && deno check --desktop --frozen vite.config.ts src/router.tsx src/server.ts src/bindings.d.ts src/lib/sse.ts src/routes/__root.tsx src/routes/index.tsx src/routes/onboarding.tsx src/routes/shell.tsx src/server/binary.ts src/server/boot.ts src/server/exec-bridge.ts src/server/exec-normalize.ts src/server/lifecycle.ts src/server/paths.ts src/server/portal-proxy.ts src/server/supervisor.ts src/server/paths_test.ts && deno test --frozen src/server/paths_test.ts
